message:
feat: auto-detect issue prefix from JSONL during migration

When importing from JSONL with `br sync --import-only` and no prefix is
configured, br now automatically detects the prefix from the first
non-tombstone issue in the JSONL file.

This significantly improves the migration experience for users coming from
beads (bd) who used custom prefixes (e.g., "mcp-" instead of "bd-"). Previously,
they had to manually run `br init --prefix <prefix>` before importing.

Now the migration workflow is simply:
  1. Remove incompatible beads.db
  2. Run `br sync --import-only`
  3. br detects prefix automatically and persists it to config

The detected prefix is persisted to the database config, so subsequent
operations use it without needing the `--prefix` flag.

Addresses feedback from issue #3.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
